description: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant, quality information to support the functioning of internal control.

subcriteria.name: data_classification
subcriteria.reference_text: Data classification policy defining sensitivity levels such as public, internal, confidential, and restricted. Classification determines handling requirements, access controls, encryption, and retention. Data owners assigned for each classification tier.

subcriteria.name: asset_inventory
subcriteria.reference_text: Inventory of information assets including production systems, databases, SaaS applications, and data stores. Critical and sensitive systems identified and labeled. Asset inventory maintained in a CMDB or spreadsheet with owner, classification, and last review date.

subcriteria.name: information_quality_controls
subcriteria.reference_text: Controls in place to ensure information is timely, accurate, complete, and protected. Data validation, input checks, and reconciliation processes documented. Data integrity verified through automated checks.

mismatch_signals.reason: Physical access controls are not information quality evidence.
Incident response is not information quality management.
